name: datachain
description: Data Memory: the operational data context layer for AI agents - typed, versioned datasets over images, video, docs and tables
summaryZh: Data Memory: the operational data context layer for AI agents - typed, versioned datasets over images, video, docs and tables 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
